thought: Since today is Tuesday, we know that 7 days from today will be Tuesday again (because a week has 7 days). Then, 7 more days will take us to the next Tuesday, which is 14 days from the original day. So, 14 days from today will be Tuesday.

We have already determined that 7 days from Tuesday is Tuesday, and another 7 days will take us to the next Tuesday. So, 14 days from today will be Tuesday, but we are looking for the day of the week 14 days ahead, not the same day. Therefore, 14 days from today will be Sunday, as Tuesday follows Monday.

The tank was initially half full, which means it was 1/2 of the whole tank. After draining one quarter, the remaining volume is (1/2 - 1/4) of the whole tank. This simplifies to 1/4 of the whole tank.

  "thought": "We have the tank's volume as 1/4 of the whole tank. To find out what fraction of the tank is full now, we need to subtract the drained volume from the initial volume. The drained volume was 1/4 of the whole tank, so the remaining volume is (1/4 - 1/4) of the whole tank, which simplifies to 0/4 or 0/ the whole tank. Since the whole tank is 1, the fraction of the tank that is full is 0/1, which is 0.",
